requirement_topic.en: EAC Conformity — TR EAEU 037/2016 Radio Equipment Safety (EAEU Single Market / Armenia)
requirement_topic.zh: EAC合格标志——TR EAEU 037/2016无线电设备安全（EAEU单一市场/亚美尼亚）
requirement_topic.zht: EAC合格標誌——TR EAEU 037/2016無線電設備安全（EAEU單一市場/亞美尼亞）

summary.en: Radio equipment placed on the EAEU market — which includes Armenia, Russia, Kazakhstan, Belarus, and Kyrgyzstan — must comply with Technical Regulation of the EAEU TR EAEU 037/2016 'On the safety of radio equipment' and carry the EAC (Eurasian Conformity — Евразийское соответствие) mark. TR EAEU 037/2016 covers radio transmitters and receivers, Wi-Fi access points (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz), Bluetooth devices, IoT modules, cellular-enabled products, and wireless sensor devices. Conformity assessment may be carried out via type examination by a notified body (EAC Certificate) or via manufacturer's declaration of conformity (EAC DoC) for lower-risk categories. Test reports must be issued by accredited EAEU laboratories. The EAC mark must appear on the product and packaging. EAC certificates are issued by accredited certification bodies recognised by the Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) and registered in the EAEU Unified Register. The EAC certificate or DoC must name a legal entity registered in an EAEU member state as the declarant or certificate holder. For Armenia specifically: SARM (Armenian Standards Institute) administers GOST-derived national standards that underpin the EAEU framework; Armenian-language markings and documentation are required for retail placement on the Armenian market. 5 GHz W52 (channels 36–48) and W53 (channels 52–64) are restricted to indoor use in Armenia; outdoor use of these sub-bands requires PSRC coordination.
summary.zh: 投放EAEU市场的无线电设备——涵盖亚美尼亚、俄罗斯、哈萨克斯坦、白俄罗斯及吉尔吉斯斯坦——须符合EAEU技术法规TR EAEU 037/2016《无线电设备安全》，并贴附EAC（欧亚合格——Евразийское соответствие）标志。TR EAEU 037/2016适用于无线电收发器、Wi-Fi接入点（2.4GHz及5GHz）、蓝牙设备、物联网模块、蜂窝产品及无线传感器设备。合格评定可通过指定机构的型式检验（EAC证书）或针对较低风险类别的制造商合格声明（EAC DoC）进行。测试报告须由经认可的EAEU实验室出具。产品及包装上须贴附EAC标志。EAC证书由欧亚经济委员会（EEC）承认的认可认证机构颁发，并登记在EAEU统一注册册中。EAC证书或合格声明须将在EAEU成员国注册的法律实体列为声明人或证书持有人。就亚美尼亚而言：SARM（亚美尼亚标准化研究院）管理支撑EAEU框架的GOST衍生国家标准；投放亚美尼亚零售市场须有亚美尼亚语标识和文件。亚美尼亚规定5GHz W52（第36–48信道）和W53（第52–64信道）仅限室内使用；室外使用这些子频段须经PSRC协调。
summary.zht: 投放EAEU市場的無線電設備——涵蓋亞美尼亞、俄羅斯、哈薩克斯坦、白俄羅斯及吉爾吉斯斯坦——須符合EAEU技術法規TR EAEU 037/2016《無線電設備安全》，並貼附EAC（歐亞合格——Евразийское соответствие）標誌。TR EAEU 037/2016適用於無線電收發器、Wi-Fi接入點（2.4GHz及5GHz）、藍牙設備、物聯網模組、蜂窩產品及無線傳感器設備。合格評定可通過指定機構的型式檢驗（EAC證書）或針對較低風險類別的製造商合格聲明（EAC DoC）進行。測試報告須由經認可的EAEU實驗室出具。產品及包裝上須貼附EAC標誌。EAC證書由歐亞經濟委員會（EEC）承認的認可認證機構頒發，並登記在EAEU統一註冊冊中。EAC證書或合格聲明須將在EAEU成員國登記的法律實體列為聲明人或證書持有人。就亞美尼亞而言：SARM（亞美尼亞標準化研究院）管理支撐EAEU框架的GOST衍生國家標準；投放亞美尼亞零售市場須有亞美尼亞語標識和文件。亞美尼亞規定5GHz W52（第36–48信道）和W53（第52–64信道）僅限室內使用；室外使用這些子頻段須經PSRC協調。

standards_or_laws: TR EAEU 037/2016 — Technical Regulation of the Eurasian Economic Union 'On the safety of radio equipment' (Decision of the EEC Council No. 38, 22 June 2016)
EAC (Eurasian Conformity) marking requirements — Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC)
Decision of the EEC Council No. 41 (2013) — Unified list of products subject to mandatory conformity assessment in the EAEU
PSRC (Public Services Regulatory Commission of Armenia) — spectrum allocation decisions restricting 5 GHz W52/W53 to indoor use

summary.en: China does not participate in the EAEU and has no direct national equivalent to TR EAEU 037/2016. The closest Chinese parallel for radio equipment is SRRC type approval (for radio transmission equipment under MIIT), which covers spectrum conformity using Chinese technical standards such as GB 15629.11 (Wi-Fi / WLAN, aligned with IEEE 802.11) and YBT 1491 series (Bluetooth). CCC certification covers electrical safety and some EMC aspects. MIIT NAL is required for telecom terminal equipment. China also restricts certain 5 GHz channels — notably 5.8 GHz band usage differs — but Chinese channel plans and power limits may not align with Armenian/EAEU band plans. Neither CCC, SRRC, MIIT NAL, CE, nor FCC substitutes for EAC marking under TR EAEU 037/2016.
summary.zh: 中国不参与EAEU，国内也无TR EAEU 037/2016的直接对应要求。最接近的类比为针对无线电发射设备的SRRC型号核准（工业和信息化部下属），采用中国技术标准（如Wi-Fi适用GB 15629.11、蓝牙适用YBT 1491系列）。CCC认证涵盖电气安全和部分电磁兼容方面。电信终端设备须取得工业和信息化部NAL。中国对部分5GHz信道亦有限制——尤其是5.8GHz频段用法有所不同——但中国信道规划和功率限值可能与亚美尼亚/EAEU频段规划不一致。CCC、SRRC、工业和信息化部NAL、CE及FCC均不可替代TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC标志。
summary.zht: 中國不參與EAEU，國內也無TR EAEU 037/2016的直接對應要求。最接近的類比為針對無線電發射設備的SRRC型號核准（工業和信息化部下屬），採用中國技術標準（如Wi-Fi適用GB 15629.11、藍牙適用YBT 1491系列）。CCC認證涵蓋電氣安全和部分電磁相容方面。電信終端設備須取得工業和信息化部NAL。中國對部分5GHz信道亦有限制——尤其是5.8GHz頻段用法有所不同——但中國信道規劃和功率限值可能與亞美尼亞/EAEU頻段規劃不一致。CCC、SRRC、工業和信息化部NAL、CE及FCC均不可替代TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC標誌。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology — LAN/MAN (Wi-Fi / WLAN standard, China, aligned with IEEE 802.11)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, covers electrical safety and partial EMC for in-scope products
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China

gap.en: TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC conformity marking is mandatory for all radio equipment sold in Armenia and any EAEU member state. Chinese SRRC, CCC, MIIT NAL, CE, and FCC documentation do not satisfy EAEU requirements. The manufacturer or EAEU-registered legal entity must obtain an EAC DoC or Certificate from an accredited EAEU certification body, supported by test reports from EAEU-accredited laboratories. The EAC certificate or DoC must be registered in the EAEU Unified Register. Unlike Kazakhstan (which additionally requires a separate OTAU national type approval), Armenia does not operate a parallel national type approval layer on top of EAC for radio equipment — EAC conformity obtained anywhere in the EAEU is valid. However, Armenian 5 GHz channel restrictions (W52/W53 indoor-only) must be reflected in product firmware and documentation; devices approved for unrestricted 5 GHz operation in China may require firmware adjustment for the Armenian market.
gap.zh: TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合格标志对在亚美尼亚及任何EAEU成员国销售的无线电设备均为强制要求。中国SRRC、CCC、工业和信息化部NAL、CE及FCC文件不满足EAEU要求。制造商或EAEU注册法律实体须从经认可的EAEU认证机构取得EAC合格声明或证书，并附上EAEU认可实验室的测试报告。EAC证书或合格声明须登记在EAEU合格证书统一注册册中。与哈萨克斯坦（另需单独的OTAU国家型号核准）不同，亚美尼亚在EAC之上不设并行的无线电设备国家型号核准层——在EAEU任何成员国取得的EAC合规在亚美尼亚均有效。但亚美尼亚5GHz信道限制（W52/W53仅限室内）须在产品固件和文件中体现；在中国被批准不受限制使用5GHz的设备可能需要针对亚美尼亚市场调整固件。
gap.zht: TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合格標誌對在亞美尼亞及任何EAEU成員國銷售的無線電設備均為強制要求。中國SRRC、CCC、工業和信息化部NAL、CE及FCC文件不滿足EAEU要求。製造商或EAEU登記法律實體須從經認可的EAEU認證機構取得EAC合格聲明或證書，並附上EAEU認可實驗室的測試報告。EAC證書或合格聲明須登記在EAEU合格證書統一註冊冊中。與哈薩克斯坦（另需單獨的OTAU國家型號核准）不同，亞美尼亞在EAC之上不設並行的無線電設備國家型號核准層——在EAEU任何成員國取得的EAC合規在亞美尼亞均有效。但亞美尼亞5GHz信道限制（W52/W53僅限室內）須在產品固件和文件中體現；在中國被批准不受限制使用5GHz的設備可能需要針對亞美尼亞市場調整固件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity marking under TR EAEU 037/2016 required for all radio equipment placed on the EAEU market (including Armenia); 5 GHz W52/W53 restricted to indoor use
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China is not an EAEU member; closest equivalent is SRRC type approval (mandatory for radio transmission equipment in China)

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Decision of the EEC Council No. 38

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC conformity marking is mandatory for all radio and wireless devices sold in Armenia. Chinese SRRC, CCC, MIIT NAL, CE, and FCC documentation do not satisfy this requirement. An EAC DoC or Certificate from an accredited EAEU certification body, with EAEU-lab test reports, is required. Unlike Kazakhstan, Armenia does not add a separate national type approval on top of EAC — but Armenian 5 GHz W52/W53 indoor-only restrictions must be reflected in device firmware and labelling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合格标志对所有在亚美尼亚销售的无线电及无线设备为强制要求。中国SRRC、CCC、工业和信息化部NAL、CE及FCC文件不满足此要求。须从经认可的EAEU认证机构取得附有EAEU实验室测试报告的EAC合格声明或证书。与哈萨克斯坦不同，亚美尼亚在EAC之上不增加单独的国家型号核准——但5GHz W52/W53仅限室内使用的限制须在设备固件和标签中体现。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合格標誌對所有在亞美尼亞銷售的無線電及無線設備為強制要求。中國SRRC、CCC、工業和信息化部NAL、CE及FCC文件不滿足此要求。須從經認可的EAEU認證機構取得附有EAEU實驗室測試報告的EAC合格聲明或證書。與哈薩克斯坦不同，亞美尼亞在EAC之上不增加單獨的國家型號核准——但5GHz W52/W53僅限室內使用的限制須在設備固件和標籤中體現。

requirement_topic.en: EAC Conformity — TR CU 020/2011 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EAEU Single Market / Armenia)
requirement_topic.zh: EAC合格标志——TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容（EAEU单一市场/亚美尼亚）
requirement_topic.zht: EAC合格標誌——TR CU 020/2011電磁相容（EAEU單一市場/亞美尼亞）

summary.en: Electrical and electronic equipment placed on the EAEU market — including Armenia — must comply with Technical Regulation of the Customs Union TR CU 020/2011 'Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices', which sets mandatory EMC requirements including emission limits and immunity levels aligned with CISPR and IEC 61000 series standards. This applies to virtually all electronic equipment that generates or is susceptible to electromagnetic interference, including intentional and unintentional radiators. For wireless and IoT devices, TR CU 020/2011 EMC conformity is assessed alongside TR EAEU 037/2016 (radio) and TR EAEU 004/2011 (electrical safety) — a single EAC mark on the product covers all applicable technical regulations. Conformity assessment for wireless devices typically follows the certification route (type examination by an accredited EAEU body), though a declaration of conformity route exists for some categories. Test reports must be from EAEU-accredited EMC testing laboratories. The combined EAC mark must appear on the product, packaging, and in technical documentation. In Armenia, SARM administers and publishes the GOST-series standards referenced under TR CU 020/2011.
summary.zh: 投放EAEU市场（含亚美尼亚）的电气和电子设备，须符合海关联盟技术法规TR CU 020/2011《技术设备电磁兼容性》，该法规规定了与CISPR及IEC 61000系列标准接轨的强制性电磁兼容要求，包括发射限值和抗扰度级别。几乎所有产生或受电磁干扰影响的电子设备均须达标，涵盖有意和无意辐射体。对于无线及物联网设备，TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容合规与TR EAEU 037/2016（无线电）及TR EAEU 004/2011（电气安全）一并评定——产品上的单一EAC标志涵盖所有适用技术法规。无线设备的合格评定通常采用认证路径（经认可的EAEU机构进行型式检验），但部分类别也可采用合格声明路径。测试报告须来自EAEU认可的电磁兼容测试实验室。组合EAC标志须出现在产品、包装及技术文件中。在亚美尼亚，SARM负责管理和发布TR CU 020/2011所引用的GOST系列标准。
summary.zht: 投放EAEU市場（含亞美尼亞）的電氣和電子設備，須符合海關聯盟技術法規TR CU 020/2011《技術設備電磁相容性》，該法規規定了與CISPR及IEC 61000系列標準接軌的強制性電磁相容要求，包括發射限值和抗擾度級別。幾乎所有產生或受電磁干擾影響的電子設備均須達標，涵蓋有意和無意輻射體。對於無線及物聯網設備，TR CU 020/2011電磁相容合規與TR EAEU 037/2016（無線電）及TR EAEU 004/2011（電氣安全）一並評定——產品上的單一EAC標誌涵蓋所有適用技術法規。無線設備的合格評定通常採用認證路徑（經認可的EAEU機構進行型式檢驗），但部分類別也可採用合格聲明路徑。測試報告須來自EAEU認可的電磁相容測試實驗室。組合EAC標誌須出現在產品、包裝及技術文件中。在亞美尼亞，SARM負責管理和發布TR CU 020/2011所引用的GOST系列標準。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union 'Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices' (Decision of the CU Commission No. 879, 9 December 2011)
GOST 32137-2013 — Electromagnetic compatibility; GOST series aligned with IEC CISPR publications for emission and immunity test methods applicable under TR CU 020/2011
SARM (Armenian Standards Institute) — administers GOST-derived EMC standards in Armenia under the EAEU framework

summary.en: China's mandatory EMC regime for electronic and electrical equipment is enforced through the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme using GB/T 9254 (Information Technology Equipment emission, aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2). For wireless devices, EMC is also partially covered under SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL testing. Chinese EMC certification to GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 is conducted by CNCA-designated laboratories and does not substitute for EAEU EMC conformity under TR CU 020/2011, which uses GOST standards aligned with CISPR and IEC 61000 series. While the underlying technical requirements are broadly similar, EAEU-accredited test reports and conformity documentation are required.
summary.zh: 中国针对电气和电子设备的强制性电磁兼容制度通过CCC（中国强制认证）体系执行，采用标准GB/T 9254（信息技术设备辐射，与CISPR 22/32接轨）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射，与IEC 61000-3-2接轨）。对于无线设备，电磁兼容性也部分涵盖于SRRC型号核准和工业和信息化部NAL测试中。依据GB/T 9254和GB 17625.1进行的中国电磁兼容认证由CNCA指定实验室开展，不可替代TR CU 020/2011下采用与CISPR及IEC 61000系列接轨的GOST标准进行的EAEU电磁兼容合规。尽管基础技术要求大体相近，EAEU认可的测试报告和合规文件仍为必要条件。
summary.zht: 中國針對電氣和電子設備的強制性電磁相容制度通過CCC（中國強制認證）體系執行，採用標準GB/T 9254（信息技術設備輻射，與CISPR 22/32接軌）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射，與IEC 61000-3-2接軌）。對於無線設備，電磁相容性也部分涵蓋於SRRC型號核准和工業和信息化部NAL測試中。依據GB/T 9254和GB 17625.1進行的中國電磁相容認證由CNCA指定實驗室開展，不可替代TR CU 020/2011下採用與CISPR及IEC 61000系列接軌的GOST標準進行的EAEU電磁相容合規。儘管基礎技術要求大體相近，EAEU認可的測試報告和合規文件仍為必要條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information Technology Equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (CCC, aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 17625.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (CCC, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, mandatory EMC certification for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

gap.en: Chinese CCC EMC certification (GB/T 9254, GB 17625.1) does not satisfy EAEU TR CU 020/2011 requirements. TR CU 020/2011 uses GOST standards aligned with the CISPR and IEC 61000 series, but the conformity assessment must be conducted under the EAEU framework by an EAEU-accredited laboratory and certified by an accredited EAEU certification body. While the underlying technical requirements are broadly similar (both draw on CISPR and IEC 61000 methods), the test reports and conformity documentation must originate from EAEU-accredited entities to be valid for EAC marking. Products must carry a combined EAC mark covering TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), TR EAEU 037/2016 (radio), and where applicable TR EAEU 004/2011 (electrical safety). Unlike Kazakhstan's OTAU, Armenia has no additional national EMC notification layer beyond the EAEU framework.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电磁兼容认证（GB/T 9254、GB 17625.1）不满足EAEU TR CU 020/2011要求。TR CU 020/2011采用与CISPR及IEC 61000系列接轨的GOST标准，但合格评定须在EAEU框架内由EAEU认可实验室开展，并由经认可的EAEU认证机构颁发证书。尽管基础技术要求大体相近（均参考CISPR和IEC 61000方法），测试报告和合规文件须来自EAEU认可实体，方可有效用于EAC标志。产品须贴附同时覆盖TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）、TR EAEU 037/2016（无线电）及适用时TR EAEU 004/2011（电气安全）的组合EAC标志。与哈萨克斯坦OTAU不同，亚美尼亚在EAEU框架之外无额外的国家电磁兼容通报层。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電磁相容認證（GB/T 9254、GB 17625.1）不滿足EAEU TR CU 020/2011要求。TR CU 020/2011採用與CISPR及IEC 61000系列接軌的GOST標準，但合格評定須在EAEU框架內由EAEU認可實驗室開展，並由經認可的EAEU認證機構頒發證書。儘管基礎技術要求大體相近（均參考CISPR和IEC 61000方法），測試報告和合規文件須來自EAEU認可實體，方可有效用於EAC標誌。產品須貼附同時覆蓋TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）、TR EAEU 037/2016（無線電）及適用時TR EAEU 004/2011（電氣安全）的組合EAC標誌。與哈薩克斯坦OTAU不同，亞美尼亞在EAEU框架之外無額外的國家電磁相容通報層。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity marking under TR CU 020/2011 required for all electrical and electronic equipment placed on the EAEU market (including Armenia)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC EMC certification to GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 required for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Decision of the CU Commission No. 879

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TR CU 020/2011 EAC conformity (EMC) is mandatory for all electronic equipment sold in Armenia and other EAEU member states. Chinese CCC EMC documentation does not substitute. EAEU-accredited lab testing and certification body issuance of an EAC certificate or DoC is required. Products must display a combined EAC mark covering radio (TR EAEU 037/2016), EMC (TR CU 020/2011), and electrical safety (TR EAEU 004/2011) as applicable. Armenia has no additional national EMC layer beyond EAEU.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TR CU 020/2011 EAC合格标志（电磁兼容）对所有在亚美尼亚及其他EAEU成员国销售的电子设备为强制要求。中国CCC电磁兼容文件不可替代。须经EAEU认可实验室测试并由认证机构颁发EAC证书或合格声明。产品须贴附同时覆盖无线电（TR EAEU 037/2016）、电磁兼容（TR CU 020/2011）及电气安全（TR EAEU 004/2011）（适用时）的组合EAC标志。亚美尼亚在EAEU之上无额外国家电磁兼容层。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TR CU 020/2011 EAC合格標誌（電磁相容）對所有在亞美尼亞及其他EAEU成員國銷售的電子設備為強制要求。中國CCC電磁相容文件不可替代。須經EAEU認可實驗室測試並由認證機構頒發EAC證書或合格聲明。產品須貼附同時覆蓋無線電（TR EAEU 037/2016）、電磁相容（TR CU 020/2011）及電氣安全（TR EAEU 004/2011）（適用時）的組合EAC標誌。亞美尼亞在EAEU之上無額外國家電磁相容層。
